Metadata.title: BitRouter — Open Intelligence Router for LLM Agents
Metadata.description: The zero-ops LLM gateway for agent runtimes. Single binary. Zero infrastructure dependencies. Agent-native control.

Hero.headline: Open Intelligence Router for LLM Agents
Hero.subtitle: Optimize your agent runtime to perform cheaper, safer, and better. Meet Runtime Routing Intelligence
Hero.timelineLabel: See it in action — a 6-call agent session, routed in real time

IntegrationBar.heading: Works with any leading agent runtime

runtimeNative.title: Agent-Native Gateway
runtimeNative.description: Agents discover and select models at runtime with KYA identity and payment delegation. Not an external proxy bolted on — a native gateway for autonomous agents.

smartRouting.title: Smart Routing
smartRouting.benefit: Right model for every call. Automatically.
smartRouting.description: Configurable routing tables map model names to providers. Cost and performance optimization with automatic fallbacks and escalation. Sub-10ms overhead.

policyControl.title: Zero-Ops Deployment
policyControl.description: One Rust binary — no Postgres, no Redis, no Docker orchestration. cargo install bitrouter && bitrouter start. Self-host or use the managed service.

multiProvider.title: Multi-Provider
multiProvider.description: Route across OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Mistral, and more through a single endpoint. Add providers in config — no code changes.

costOptimization.title: Cost Optimization
costOptimization.description: Automatically route to the cheapest capable model. Track savings per session, per agent, per team.

fallbackRetry.title: Fallback & Retry
fallbackRetry.description: Automatic retries with exponential backoff. Cross-provider failover when a provider goes down.

usageAnalytics.title: Usage Analytics
usageAnalytics.description: Per-agent, per-model usage dashboards. Token counts, latency percentiles, cost breakdowns.

agentSdk.title: Agent SDK
agentSdk.description: First-class TypeScript and Python SDKs. KYA identity, payment delegation, and skill discovery built in.

rateLimiting.title: Rate Limiting
rateLimiting.description: Per-agent and per-model rate limits. Quota management across teams with automatic queuing.

caching.title: Semantic Caching
caching.description: Cache identical and semantically similar requests. Reduce costs and latency for repeated patterns.

security.title: Security & Guardrails
security.description: Content filtering, PII redaction, and audit logging. Policy-as-code for agent behavior boundaries.

Setup.heading: One line to start routing
Setup.subtitle: BitRouter is OpenAI-compatible. Swap your base URL. Keep everything else.
